name: Email Writer
description: AI-powered email drafting assistant. Describe your email and get a polished draft instantly.
longDescription: Email Writer uses AI to help you draft professional, casual, or formal emails in seconds. Simply describe what you want to say, pick a tone, and get a polished draft ready to send. Save drafts for later and use streaming for real-time generation. Supports multiple AI providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, and Gemini.
author: vibedepot
